label: OpenRouter Config
description: OpenRouter model and parameters. When multiple OpenRouterInference nodes share the same settings, point them at one OpenRouterConfig node to keep maintenance simple. Only use multiple configs when you truly need different settings.

inputs.name: systemPrompt
inputs.description: Optional system prompt. Can be wired from upstream or set as a config field.

outputs.name: config
outputs.description: OpenRouter configuration object fed into one or more OpenRouterInference nodes.

fields.label: Enable Reasoning
fields.description: Enable extended thinking for supported models

fields.label: Reasoning Effort
fields.description: Only used when reasoning is enabled

fields.label: Provider
fields.description: Serve the model from one specific OpenRouter provider (anthropic, fireworks, amazon-bedrock, ...). Leave empty to let OpenRouter route. Providers charge different rates for the same model, so pinning one also pins the price.

fields.label: Allow provider fallbacks
fields.description: When a provider is pinned, still fall back to others if it is unavailable. On by default. Turning it off makes the call fail rather than be served (and billed) by someone else.
